creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #7)
There is also d3d12 to be possibly added somewhere, hence "more cleaning".

(In reply to gnikl from comment #8)
> AFAICT, that is the "old" dma-buf.h. The version in 23.1.7 uses __u64 here.
Yes, I realised that the dma-buf.h patch just appended itself to the correct one thus creating the clashing. Got a bit trigger happy before I finished figuring out which leftover patches needed to go.
